scripts.name: f
scripts.code:
:*://*::
Clipboard =
(
extract all durable project knowledge, decisions, architecture, workflows, bugs, fixes, commands, and next steps into a reusable memory file or update existing ones before I start a fresh chat.
)
Sleep, 200
SendInput, ^v
return
